description: Warmly is a warm-outbound platform that de-anonymizes website visitors, combines intent signals, and helps sales teams engage in-market accounts at the right moment.
tagline: Warm outbound from website and intent signals
overview: Warmly reveals the companies and people visiting your website, layers in intent signals, and helps reps engage warm prospects through chat, email, and LinkedIn while interest is high.
what_is: Warmly is a signal-based outbound tool that focuses on prospects already showing interest. It de-anonymizes website traffic to show which companies and people are visiting, then combines that with intent and CRM data so reps reach out when an account is in-market.

It is most useful for turning anonymous site visits into timely conversations: surfacing warm accounts, alerting reps, and triggering engagement across chat, email, and LinkedIn. The aim is to prioritize accounts that are likely to respond rather than cold lists.

Warmly connects to CRMs, enrichment, and outreach tools to fit a go-to-market stack. It concentrates on visitor identification, intent, and engagement rather than acting as a full CRM or marketing-automation suite.
